content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Subordinates". Refer to LeetCode description: https://cses.fi/problemset/task/1674
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of employees. Then, for each employee, a line containing the index of their supervisor (or 0 if they have no supervisor).
content.outputFormat: The number of subordinates of each employee, one number per line.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a tree data structure to represent the organizational hierarchy and perform a depth-first search to count the number of subordinates for each employee.
